shared_properties: 2px outline width and single-fill cactus interior.
differences: Width increases from 34 px to 102 px.
Height increases from 70 px to 100 px.
Three grouped stems create a wider collision silhouette.

context.usage: Spawned from the ground obstacle table and moves left at current obstacle speed.

shape.silhouette: Grouped cactus silhouette with vertical stems, spike arms, and 2px outline.

acceptance_criteria: All opaque pixels use #535353 and transparent background only.
Ground-contact pixels form one continuous baseline contact band.

reference_images.label: cactus_obstacle_reference
reference_images.purpose: Ground obstacle size bands and arm-spike silhouette anchor.

reference_images.label: pterodactyl_reference
reference_images.purpose: Air obstacle wing cadence and body proportion anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteBundle for static hazards and SpriteSheetBundle for wing-flap obstacles.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/obstacle_cactus_large_static.png through AssetServer and register the handle under obstacle_cactus_large_static.
runtime_notes: Keep source pixels unfiltered with nearest-neighbor sampling and integer world transforms.
Spawn order follows execution_order so downstream setup can validate deterministic asset availability.
Collision and UI code read logical dimensions from specs.dimensions_px rather than texture metadata.
